results.title: ayeT-Studios is rated "Poor" with 2.4 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Created with AI, based on recent reviews

Evaluating 62 reviews, most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Many customers reported that the app frequently glitches during installation, leading to voided rewards and untracked progress. People also experienced significant issues with payment, often not receiving rewards for completed tasks and encountering difficulties when trying to get paid. The majority of users found c ustomer service to be unhelpful, with long response times and a tendency to ignore inquiries, especially when dealing with payment disputes. Conversely, a small portion of people felt satisfied with the customer support, noting quick responses and effective resolution of their issues, particularly for tracking problems and missing rewards.See more [...] ### Was this summary helpful?

## I had multiple issues with ayeT Studios…
I had multiple issues with ayeT Studios offers not tracking correctly.

I completed tasks exactly as required (no VPN, same device, direct link), but the rewards were not granted. Even worse, my trust score was reduced due to their tracking failure.

This is very disappointing and unfair to users who spend time completing offers.

I would not recommend relying on this offerwall.

Image 38: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Easyloanapprove.com is a scam
Easyloanapprove.com is a scam! I paid attention to how they never asked about my employer for one. Two, they never asked for any information once they finally realized they didn’t ask about it. Also once I filled out the info and they have my bank info, now all a sudden they have no rep available and I have to call me back in 15min. They gave me some bs about a small deposit between $500-$1000 for an insurance fee to cover the loan amount if it’s not paid. I’m like aye yo that’s not how that works and why don’t you know the exact amount. Just don’t use these mfs!

## Was told I was approved for $3,000
Was told I was approved for $3,000 and then told I needed to pay up front the first payment of $80.01 first with Cashapp and buy crypto or pay with Apple pay card. Then pay a $150 tax with Applepay before the loan would be issued. I bought an Applepay card for $150 contacted them with the code and they said only $27 was on an $150. And then said I needed $150 to get the loan. Then within 15 minutes my loan would be issued???? I am very sure I will not get this loan. They say this company is a scam if they ask for applepay cards ahead of time. Money is tight what a scam.

results.content:
If you don’t find a post or solution, start a thread by posting your issue to the board. Members of the community may offer helpful solutions when we can't directly fix the problem.Check out our video on how to use EA Forums.

Still having issues?

Get in touch with our customer support team for more help. [...] cancel

Technical issues

# How to report a problem with an EA game

1 min read

## Overview

Having issues with one of our games? Here’s how to give feedback and get help.

## Report a bug or give feedback

Sharing your feedback helps us improve your gameplay experience.Use the search bar in EA Forums to see if other players have already posted about your issue.Other players may have already reported the problem. If they have, you can click the Like button under the original post, which lets the poster know that you have the same issue.

If you’re reporting a bug, include the following information:

 the error code
 the date and time that you noticed the bug
 your device type
 any troubleshooting steps you’ve already tried (like restarting your device).
